name: Bogracs Gulyas (Kettle Goulash)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 4 tablespoons bacon fat
2. Add 5 large onions, coarsely chopped
3. Add 2 large green peppers, chopped
4. Add 3 garlic cloves, minced
5. Add 1½ tablespoons Hungarian paprika
6. Add 3 pounds beef, cut into 1-inch cubes
7. Season with pepper and salt to taste
8. Add 6 ounces tomato paste
9. Add sour cream at room temperature
Preheat oven to 325°F. Heat the fat in a deep heavy pot. Cook the onions, peppers, and garlic until the onions are limp and transparent. Add paprika and cook until it has lost its raw taste. Add beef and remaining ingredients except sour cream. Stir well to combine. Simmer in preheated oven for 1½ to 2 hours or until the meat is tender. Adjust oven temperature during cooking time so contents of pot remain at a simmer. Serve in shallow soup bowls with a tablespoon of sour cream atop each serving.
